verify.title: Verify PDF
verify.description: Upload a Zenland escrow agreement PDF to verify its authenticity and check if it matches the on-chain record.

signatureFailed.title: Invalid PDF
signatureFailed.description: This PDF is not a valid Zenland escrow agreement

dropZone.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your document
dropZone.orClickToBrowse: or click to browse. Only Zenland escrow PDFs are supported.

loading.title: Verifying on-chain...
loading.description: Checking contract data on the blockchain

hashMatch.title: Verified ✓
hashMatch.description: This PDF matches the on-chain contract record

notDeployed.title: Contract Not Deployed
notDeployed.description: This PDF was signed by Zenland, but the contract does not exist on the blockchain.
notDeployed.warningTitle: THIS IS NOT AN ACTIVE CONTRACT
notDeployed.warningDescription: Do not send any funds or goods based on this PDF. The contract must be deployed first.

hashMismatch.title: 🚨 Hash Mismatch - Potential Scam
hashMismatch.description: This PDF does not match the on-chain contract record. The document may have been tampered with.
hashMismatch.warningDescription: This could be a scam or an outdated/modified version of the contract. Only trust documents that match the on-chain hash.

contractCompleted.title: Contract Completed
contractCompleted.description: This contract has been completed and finalized.

contractNotFound.title: Contract Not Found
contractNotFound.description: This contract has not been deployed on-chain. No actions are available.

connectWallet.title: Connect Wallet
connectWallet.description: Connect your wallet to receive personalized instructions based on your role in this contract.

notParticipant.title: Not a Participant
notParticipant.description: Your connected wallet is not a participant in this contract. You are viewing as a third party.

pending.title: Waiting for Seller
pending.description: The seller needs to review and accept this contract. Contact them to confirm participation.

active.title: Contract Active
active.description: The contract is active. Wait for the seller to deliver, then release funds when satisfied.

fulfilled.title: Delivery Confirmed
fulfilled.description: The seller has confirmed fulfillment. Review the delivery and release funds if satisfied.

disputed.title: Dispute Open
disputed.description: You have opened a dispute. You can invite the agent to resolve it or propose a settlement.

agentInvited.title: Agent Investigating
agentInvited.description: The agent has been invited to resolve this dispute. Await their decision.

pending.title: Action Required
pending.description: This contract awaits your confirmation. Review the terms carefully and accept to activate the escrow.

active.title: Safe to Deliver
active.description: The contract is active and funds are locked. It's safe to deliver the product or service. The funds cannot be withdrawn except through the contract rules.

fulfilled.title: Awaiting Release
fulfilled.description: You've confirmed fulfillment. Waiting for the buyer to release funds. If they don't release within the protection period, you can claim the funds.

disputed.title: Dispute Open
disputed.description: A dispute has been opened. You can invite the agent to resolve it, propose a settlement, or issue a refund.

agentInvited.title: Agent Investigating
agentInvited.description: The agent has been invited to resolve this dispute. Await their decision.

invited.title: Action Required
invited.description: You are the agent. This contract awaits your investigation and resolution. Review the evidence and make a fair decision.

assigned.title: Assigned Agent
assigned.description: You are the assigned agent for this contract. Parties have not invited you to resolve a dispute yet.
